## ScreenShotPP v0.5.1

A capture-selection usability update.

### New

- **Adjust a capture after selecting it.** Four small white handles appear at the
  center of the selection's top, right, bottom, and left sides. Drag any handle
  to move that side independently before copying, saving, or annotating.
- The handles remain available with every annotation tool, while annotation
  resize anchors keep priority when both controls overlap.

### Fixes

- Selection resizing stays within the screen and preserves a minimum 2 px crop.
- Secondary mouse buttons no longer start or confirm a selection resize.
- Existing annotations are clipped correctly when the capture area is reduced.

### Notes

- Screen recording remains available on Windows and macOS.
- The Windows installer remains unsigned and may display a SmartScreen warning.

### License

ScreenShotPP is open source under the MIT license.
